mapper.sql: i.id, i.name, i.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, i.quantity, i.unit, i.production_date, i.shelf_life_days, i.expire_date, i.location, i.remark, i.created_at, i.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM food_item i INNER JOIN food_category c ON c.id = i.category_id
ORDER BY i.expire_date ASC, i.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{query.limit} OFFSET #{query.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM food_item i INNER JOIN food_category c ON c.id = i.category_id
SELECT FROM food_item i INNER JOIN food_category c ON c.id = i.category_id WHERE i.id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, category_id, quantity, unit, production_date, shelf_life_days, expire_date, location, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM food_item WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_item (name, category_id, quantity, unit, production_date, shelf_life_days, expire_date, location, remark) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{productionDate}, #{shelfLifeDays}, #{expireDate}, #{location}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE food_item SET name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, quantity = #{quantity}, unit = #{unit}, production_date = #{productionDate}, shelf_life_days = #{shelfLifeDays}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, location = #{location}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM food_item WHERE expire_date < #{today}

SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, COUNT(i.id) AS count FROM food_category c LEFT JOIN food_item i ON i.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.color, c.sort_order ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
